selectionFlashDurationMs.responsibility: Duration of canvas-driven selection flash highlights (ms)

selectionFlashOpacity.responsibility: Opacity of canvas-driven selection flash highlights

uiIconScale.responsibility: Global icon scale (toolbar, panels, bottom panel)
uiIconScale.notes: Options: compact (smaller icons, denser UI) or default (larger icons, more spacious). Applied via getIconSizeClass across HeaderActions, Toolbar, SearchPanel, History panels, Launch Spotlight status, Help/Workflow headers, Graph Fields icon legend, and bottom panel toolbars.

uiPanelTextFontClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for panel key/value text font

uiPanelKeyValueTextSizeClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for panel key/value text size

uiPanelKeyValueInputClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for panel key/value numeric input shell

uiPanelMonospaceTextClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for panel monospace text in Graph JSON, Parser, Schema, and Markdown editors

uiPanelRowDensityDefaultClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for default panel row padding (density="default")

uiHeaderRowHeightClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for primary header row min-height

uiHeaderRowPaddingClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for primary header row padding

uiSectionHeaderRowHeightClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for section header row min-height

uiSectionHeaderRowPaddingClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for section header row padding

uiIconFormat.responsibility: Global icon format (default vs minimal styling)

uiIconColorClass.responsibility: Base Tailwind class for icon color

uiIconHoverBgClass.responsibility: Base Tailwind class for icon hover background

uiIconButtonPaddingClass.responsibility: Base Tailwind class for icon button padding

uiIconPillClass.responsibility: Base Tailwind class for icon legend pills (scope, origin, visibility, field types)

uiIconPillLegendTextSizeClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for legend pill text size

uiIconPillBadgeTextSizeClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for badge and inline pill text size

uiIconBadgeChipClass.responsibility: Base Tailwind class for small schema/property badge chips

uiIconBadgeChipTextSizeClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for badge chip text size

uiPanelMicroLabelTextSizeClass.responsibility: Tailwind class for panel micro-label helper text size

themeMode.responsibility: Global color theme (Light, Dark, or System)
themeMode.notes: Controls the application color palette. Light mode follows GitHub Light Tritanopia, Dark mode follows GitHub Dark Tritanopia.

spotlight.margin.responsibility: Viewport margin for spotlight card clamp

spotlight.nearTopThreshold.responsibility: Top threshold before anchored card flips below target

canvasSnapGridSize.notes: Alt disables snapping while dragging. Arrow nudges follow the grid when enabled.

canvasGridVisible.responsibility: Show/hide the infinite canvas grid background

canvasGridMajorEvery.responsibility: Every N minor steps, draw a major grid

autoEnableGeospatialOnGeoImport.responsibility: auto enable geospatial on geo import

pdfImportIncludeImages.responsibility: Include extracted PDF images in Markdown output

pdfImportStreamDecodeCacheMaxBytes.responsibility: pdf import stream decode cache max bytes

pdfImportContentStreamMaxDecodeBytes.responsibility: pdf import content stream max decode bytes

pdfImportPageContentMaxBytes.responsibility: pdf import page content max bytes

pdfImportMaxToUnicodeStreamBytes.responsibility: pdf import max to unicode stream bytes

pdfImportToUnicodeMaxDecodeBytes.responsibility: pdf import to unicode max decode bytes

pdfImportImageStreamMaxDecodeBytes.responsibility: pdf import image stream max decode bytes

pdfImportMaxTextContentBytesPerPage.responsibility: pdf import max text content bytes per page

pdfImportMaxTextStreamBytes.responsibility: pdf import max text stream bytes

pdfImportMaxFormXObjectBytes.responsibility: pdf import max form xobject bytes

pdfImportMaxFormXObjectStreamBytes.responsibility: pdf import max form xobject stream bytes

pdfImportMaxFormXObjectCount.responsibility: pdf import max form xobject count

pdfImportEmbedImages.responsibility: Embed eligible images as data: URIs (bounded)

pdfImportMaxExtractedImagesPerPage.responsibility: Max images extracted per page (0 disables extraction)

pdfImportMaxEmbeddedImagesPerPage.responsibility: Max images embedded/linked per page in Markdown

pdfImportMaxEmbeddedTotalBytes.responsibility: Max total embedded image bytes per conversion

pdfImportMaxEmbeddedAssetBytes.responsibility: Max bytes per embedded image asset

pdfImportProvider.responsibility: PDF→Markdown provider (native local vs Docling remote)

pdfImportProviderFallbackToNative.responsibility: Fallback to native conversion when Docling fails

pdfImportOcrEnabled.responsibility: Enable OCR enhancement for sparse text pages

websiteImportGenerateWebpageArtifactDocs.responsibility: website import generate webpage artifact docs

schema.layout.forces.physics2dChargeScal.responsibility: Scale auto-tuned D3 many-body repulsion (when schema.layout.forces.charge is unset)

schema.layout.forces.physics2dBboxStreng.responsibility: Scale bbox/group-bbox collision strength (nodes, groups, rich-media boxes)

schema.layout.forces.physics2dVelocityDe.responsibility: Bias velocityDecay (damping) to reduce sudden motion

schema.layout.forces.physics2dMaxSpeedSc.responsibility: Scale per-tick max speed clamp (limits drastic jumps)

schema.layout.forces.physics2dStrictOver.responsibility: Scale strict overlap correction (post-layout relax for nodes/groups)

schema.layout.forces.physics2dDragCharge.responsibility: Scale drag-time charge softening while dragging

schema.layout.forces.physics2dDragDistan.responsibility: Cap drag-time charge distanceMax (localizes repulsion during dragging)

schema.layout.forces.radarFlowArrowHalfW.responsibility: radar flow arrow half width px

import.json.workspaceTarget.notes: Choose Editor Workspace, Multi-dimensional Table, or Infinite Canvas as the default JSON import landing surface.

viewportControlsPreset.notes: Used by Flow and FlowEditor renderers to decide pan drag and wheel zoom behavior.

flowEditorSelectionOnDrag.responsibility: Enable selection box on drag in Flow Editor renderer
flowEditorSelectionOnDrag.notes: When enabled with viewportControlsPreset=design, left-drag creates a selection box. When disabled, selection box uses Shift-drag like other modes.

flowEditorOverlayWheelProxyEnabled.responsibility: Enable wheel zoom/pan proxy when pointer is over Flow Editor fly-out overlays
flowEditorOverlayWheelProxyEnabled.notes: When enabled, wheel gestures over Node Quick Editor overlays are forwarded to the Flow canvas unless the overlay can scroll in that direction.

viewPinned.responsibility: Pin view (disables Fit/Selection auto-zoom + zoom-to-bounds requests)
viewPinned.notes: When enabled, Fit to Screen and Zoom to Selection modes are disabled.

fitToScreenMode.responsibility: Auto-fit graph to viewport (Fit to Screen mode)
fitToScreenMode.notes: When enabled, Pin View and Zoom to Selection modes are disabled.

zoomToSelectionMode.responsibility: Auto-zoom to current selection (Zoom to Selection mode)
zoomToSelectionMode.notes: When enabled, Pin View and Fit to Screen modes are disabled.

zoomDurationFitMs.responsibility: Animation duration (ms) for Fit-to-View / Fit-to-Screen actions
zoomDurationFitMs.notes: clamps to [0,2000]. Used by both D3 and Flow 2D renderers.

zoomDurationSelectionMs.notes: clamps to [0,2000]. Used by both D3 and Flow 2D renderers.

wheelZoomCtrlMetaBoostMultiplier.responsibility: Ctrl/Meta wheel zoom boost multiplier (trackpad pinch)
wheelZoomCtrlMetaBoostMultiplier.notes: clamps to [1,40]. Used by D3, Flow, and FlowEditor 2D renderers.

flowWheelZoomSpeedMultiplier.responsibility: Wheel zoom speed multiplier for Flow renderer
flowWheelZoomSpeedMultiplier.notes: clamps to [0.25,2.5]. Used by D3, Flow, and FlowEditor 2D renderers.

flowWheelZoomIncrementMultiplier.responsibility: Wheel zoom increment multiplier for Flow renderer
flowWheelZoomIncrementMultiplier.notes: clamps to [0.25,5.0]. Values > 1 make each wheel gesture zoom more per delta; values < 1 make it more precise.

flowWheelZoomSmoothMinDurationMs.responsibility: Min duration (ms) for Flow wheel zoom smoothing animation
flowWheelZoomSmoothMinDurationMs.notes: clamps to [10,400] and is coerced to ≤ flowWheelZoomSmoothMaxDurationMs.

flowWheelZoomSmoothMaxDurationMs.responsibility: Max duration (ms) for Flow wheel zoom smoothing animation
flowWheelZoomSmoothMaxDurationMs.notes: clamps to [10,400] and is coerced to ≥ flowWheelZoomSmoothMinDurationMs.

orchestratorTraversalDelayMs.responsibility: Delay between traversal steps in Orchestrator (ms)

graph.behavior.selectMode.notes: Selector → pick single, multi, or lasso selection behavior → shape how canvas clicks, Graph Data Table row selection, and Embed/Overlay / Dataset Inspector visualizations respond to the active selection neighborhood.

graph.behavior.createMode.notes: Edge creator → choose shift-drag, click-source-target, or panel-only edge creation → align edge gestures with selection-aware overlays so you can inspect distributions, hierarchies, clusters, and paths without losing predictable zoom and node-drag behavior.

schemaDeriveCacheCapacity.responsibility: LRU capacity for schema derive lists

schema.layout.groups.nestedPaddingStep.responsibility: Extra padding to visually separate nested groups
schema.layout.groups.nestedPaddingStep.notes: Higher values increase outer-group breathing room to prevent nested group borders from visually snapping together.

schema.layout.edges.opacity.responsibility: Base edge opacity in D3 renderer
schema.layout.edges.opacity.notes: clamps to [0,1]. For readability, keep this lower than node/group prominence.

schema.layout.edges.opacityUnderGroups.responsibility: Edge opacity when groups are enabled
schema.layout.edges.opacityUnderGroups.notes: clamps to [0,1]. Used to keep edges visually beneath group underlays.

three.voxel.districts.enabled.responsibility: Enable cluster district slabs in voxel mode

three.voxel.districts.paddingCells.responsibility: District padding in grid cells (world quantized)

three.voxel.bridges.particles.speed.responsibility: Flow particle speed along bridge curves

three.layout.sphereRadius.responsibility: Base sphere radius for node layout

three.layout.voxelAnimationEnabled.responsibility: Master on/off switch for all voxel animations

three.layout.voxelLabelShowOnHoverOnly.responsibility: voxel label show on hover only
